output.sparql:
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?player ?playerLabel ?goals WHERE {
  ?player wdt:P31 wd:Q5 ; wdt:P4297 ?goals ; rdfs:label ?playerLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?playerLabel) = "en")
  .
  FILTER(xsd:integer(?goals) > 50 && xsd:integer(?goals) < 200)
}
ORDER BY DESC(xsd:integer(?goals))
LIMIT 1

args.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>

SELECT ?player ?playerLabel ?goals
WHERE {
  ?player wdt:P31 wd:Q5 ;
          wdt:P4297 ?goals ;
          rdfs:label ?playerLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?playerLabel) = "en") .

3. The membership statement has a qualifier P5267 (goals scored).
4. Sum the goals for each player, group by player, and sort descending.
